digest.en: Israel and Hezbollah exchanged strikes in Lebanon. Iran talks remain on hold amid the escalation. Israel ordered residents of seven Lebanese towns to evacuate, citing Hezbollah activity.
digest.hi: अमेरिकी पूर्व राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप की पेंसिल्वेनिया में रैली में गोली चलने की घटना सामने आई है। इस घटना में ट्रंप बच गए, लेकिन एक व्यक्ति की मौत हो गई और दो अन्य घायल हो गए। हमलावर को भी मौके पर ही मार गिराया गया।

articles.title: Israel and Hezbollah Trade Strikes in Lebanon, as Iran Talks Remain on Hold
articles.summary: Israel and Hezbollah exchanged strikes in Lebanon as US-Iran talks stalled. Cease-fires in Lebanon and Iran are on shaky ground, with military attacks flaring and direct talks between Washington and Tehran to end their war stalled.

articles.title: What’s the latest as the Islamabad talks stall?
articles.summary: US and Iran stuck to their positions in Islamabad talks on the war. Washington and Tehran stick to their positions as mediators hope for a diplomatic breakthrough in US-Israel war on Iran.

articles.title: Mali rattled by ongoing armed attacks: What to know
articles.summary: Mali's security deteriorated due to armed groups' coordinated attacks. Mali's security situation has deteriorated in recent years, as armed groups have carried out coordinated attacks. Mali rattled by ongoing armed attacks: What to know.

articles.title: 40 years since the world’s worst nuclear disaster in Ukraine
articles.summary: Ukraine marked 40 years since the world's worst nuclear disaster. 40 years since the world’s worst nuclear disaster in Ukraine.

articles.title: ‘Man with serious weapon started shooting suddenly’: Eyewitnesses recount chilling moments from
articles.summary: An eyewitness described a man suddenly shooting with a serious weapon. ‘Man with serious weapon started shooting suddenly’: Eyewitnesses recount chilling moments from.

articles.title: Gunman believed to be targeting Trump administration officials: U.S. Attorney General
articles.summary: US Attorney General says a gunman targeted Trump administration officials. The suspect will be charged with assault and discharging a firearm on April 27, 2026. The suspect will be formally charged in federal court on Monday (April 27, 2026) with assault ‌of a federal officer ​and discharging a firearm in an attempt to kill a ⁠federal officer.

articles.title: Has China Teased Its 4th Aircraft Carrier? 'He Jian' In Video Sparks Mystery
articles.summary: China may have revealed its 4th aircraft carrier in a video. A model of the Fujian Type 003 aircraft carrier is on display. Visitors look at a model of the Fujian Type 003 aircraft carrier (File).

articles.title: Trump Event Shooting Live Updates: Accused Shooter Likely Targeted Trump And His Top Officials
articles.summary: Donald Trump was evacuated after gunshots were heard at his event. The accused shooter likely targeted Trump and his officials. Trump Event Shooting Live Updates: Accused Shooter Likely Targeted Trump And His Top Officials.

articles.title: Israel Orders Residents Of 7 Lebanese Towns To Evacuate, Blames Hezbollah
articles.summary: Israel ordered residents of 7 Lebanese towns to evacuate. The towns are north of the Litani River in southern Lebanon. The towns are north of the Litani River and the zone in southern Lebanon.

articles.title: India, New Zealand to sign FTA on April 27, target trade boost
articles.summary: India and New Zealand will sign a free trade agreement on April 27. The deal aims to boost trade between the two countries. India, New Zealand to sign FTA on April 27, target trade boost.

articles.title: Israel PM says Hezbollah 'dismantling' ceasefire with Lebanon
articles.summary: Israel PM Benjamin Netanyahu said Hezbollah is dismantling the 2006 ceasefire with Lebanon, amid rising tensions between the two countries. Israel PM says Hezbollah 'dismantling' ceasefire with Lebanon.

articles.title: U.S. Mint Buys Drug Cartel Gold and Sells It as ‘American’
articles.summary: The U. S. Mint is buying gold from Mexican drug cartels and selling it as 'American Gold Eagle' coins, exploiting a loophole in the industry's regulations as prices for the precious metal soar.

articles.title: Hungary's Magyar To Meet EU President Over Frozen Funds
articles.summary: Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban's 16-year rule ended after Magyar won a landslide victory in the April 12 election, prompting Magyar to meet EU President over frozen funds. Magyar's landslide victory in an April 12 election ended Prime Minister Viktor Orban's 16-year rule.

articles.title: Peace talks on hold, what's next?
articles.summary: Iran peace talks are on hold after the latest round of negotiations failed to yield a breakthrough, leaving the future of the talks uncertain. Iran war: Peace talks on hold, what's next?

articles.title: Car bomb explodes outside Northern Ireland police station after vehicle hijacked
articles.summary: A car bomb exploded outside a Northern Ireland police station after the vehicle was hijacked, injuring one officer in the attack. Car bomb explodes outside Northern Ireland police station after vehicle hijacked.

articles.title: "Saw Trump's Resilient Side": Indian Journalist Who Attended US Event To NDTV
articles.summary: Saurabh Shukla spoke to NDTV about attending a US event with Donald Trump. He discussed Trump's resilient side. Newsmobile editor-in-chief Saurabh Shukla in conversation with NDTV's Shiv Aroor. "Saw Trump's Resilient Side": Indian Journalist Who Attended US Event To NDTV.

articles.title: Erica Kirk In Tears After White House Dinner Shooting
articles.summary: Erica Kirk was in tears after a shooting at the Washington Hilton. The event was taking place at the time of the incident. The shooting happened at the time when the event was taking place at the Washington Hilton.

articles.title: Karoline Leavitt's Unwitting Prophecy Came True As 'Shots Fired' At Trump Event
articles.summary: Karoline Leavitt previously mentioned shots being fired. A shooting occurred at a Trump event at the Washington Hilton. White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt (file). Karoline Leavitt's Unwitting Prophecy Came True As 'Shots Fired' At Trump Event.

articles.title: Kenya's Sawe becomes first man to run marathon under two hours at London Marathon
articles.summary: The London Marathon saw a historic moment as Kenyan runner Eliud Kipchoge's training partner, Kelvin Kiptum, finished in 1 hour 59 minutes 31 seconds, becoming the first man to break the two-hour barrier in a marathon.

articles.title: Trump says Kushner, Witkoff no longer going to Pakistan for Iran talks
articles.summary: Jared Kushner and Elliott Broidy's associate, Steven Witkoff, are no longer traveling to Pakistan for Iran talks, according to US President Donald Trump. Live Updates: Trump says Kushner, Witkoff no longer going to Pakistan for Iran talks CBS News.

articles.title: 40 Years After the Meltdown, War Layers Another Disaster on Chernobyl
articles.summary: The Chernobyl disaster zone remains under army control 40 years after the meltdown, with plans to develop the contaminated area for economic benefits in Ukraine stalled for the foreseeable future.

articles.title: ट्रंप की डिनर पार्टी के दौरान हुई फ़ायरिंग के बाद भारत, पाकिस्तान समेत दुनिया के नेताओं ने क्या कहा?

articles.summary: अमेरिका और ईरान के बीच शांति की उम्मीदें बरकरार हैं। एक रिपोर्ट में दावा किया गया है कि दोनों देशों के बीच शांति के प्रयास जारी हैं। रिपोर्ट में दी गई जानकारी के अनुसार शांति की उम्मीदें बरकरार हैं।

articles.title: अस्थायी कमरे में हथियार तैयार कर मचाया तांडव, चश्मदीद ने बयां किया आंखों देखा खौफनाक मंजर
articles.summary: एक चश्मदीद ने बताया कि डोनाल्ड ट्रंप पर हमला करने वाले ने एक अस्थायी कमरे में लंबी दूरी के हथियार को तैयार किया था। यह घटना एक बॉलरूम में हुई थी जहां हमलावर ने अपनी योजना को अंजाम दिया।

articles.title: ट्रंप के कार्यक्रम में गोलीबारी का घटनाक्रम: कैसे सुरक्षा घेरा तोड़ घुसा संदिग्ध, फायरिंग के बाद

articles.title: हिल जाएगी दुनिया... गरीब हो जाएंगे 3 करोड़ लोग, अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध बना वजह
articles.summary: अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध के कारण दुनिया में 3 करोड़ लोग गरीब हो सकते हैं। इससे वैश्विक अर्थव्यवस्था और लोगों के जीवन पर नकारात्मक प्रभाव पड़ सकता है। गरीब हो जाएंगे 3 करोड़ लोग, अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध बना वजह AajTak।
